methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Growth → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.2x) to $2M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 24 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Roboneers is a Growth-stage company in the Defense & Security sector founded by Anton and Oleksiy Skrypnyk. The company has raised $2M+ to date. The Defense & Security comp universe comprises 2 public peers (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private peers, including Anduril Industries, Saronic, Flock Safety, Shield AI, and Chaos Industries. However, the private peer set lacks sufficient same-stage or valuation-tier overlap to support a reliable peer-median multiple approach.

The Stage-Progression method is applicable and forms the basis of valuation. Using total capital raised ($2M) as a proxy baseline and applying a typical Growth-stage step-up multiplier of 1.2x yields $2.4M. This method assumes incremental value creation consistent with stage progression norms, absent material operational or market data suggesting material deviation.

The triangulated valuation range is $2.0M (low) to $2.76M (high), with a median of $2.4M. This narrow range reflects reliance on a single applicable method. Key uncertainties include the lack of comparable transaction data for same-stage Defense & Security companies and absence of revenue, customer, or technical differentiation metrics. Any material shift in funding environment or demonstrated traction would warrant re-assessment against actual operational performance rather than stage-proxy mechanics alone.
